organization.name: Next Tech Lab AP
organization.type: Student-led innovation hub and research laboratory
organization.mission: To reverse brain-drain and foster deep research culture in India through interdisciplinary student innovation.
organization.description: A collaborative, non-hierarchical student research lab focused on solving real-world problems using cutting-edge technologies, participating in global competitions, publishing research, and building prototype solutions. Next Tech Lab hosts workshops, paper reading sessions, game jams, hackathons, and project expos to enhance student skills.
other_campuses: SRM Institute of Science and Technology (Chennai)
recognition: Silver Winner — QS Reimagine Education Award (Student-Led Innovation, 2018)

history.inspiration: MIT Media Lab collaborative research model

timeline.event: Founded after founders spent a semester at MIT
Next Tech Lab established at SRM University-AP Amaravati campus
Won QS Reimagine Education Silver Award for Student-Led Innovation at Wharton School

achievements_and_recognition: Only Indian organization to win QS Reimagine Education Award (2018)
Participation in global events such as Game Developers Conference
Members showcased work at India HCI Conference and international summits
Advisors from institutions like MIT, Google Brain, University of Cambridge and Harvard
Official member of ICXR international XR research network
Students have excelled at hackathons like ETH Denver (2020) and national hackathons
activities: Next Tech Lab Expos and project showcases

projects.name: dPIN
projects.description: Distributed and trustless infrastructure monitoring network

university.name: SRM University-AP
university.description: A research-oriented university combining engineering, science, liberal arts, business, and global exposure with strong emphasis on innovation and entrepreneurship.
highlights: International collaborations (UC Berkeley, Carnegie Mellon, WI-Madison, etc.)
Supports student-led labs like Next Tech Lab
Participation in cutting-edge initiatives (AI Institute, Quantum Computing Hub)
academics: Undergraduate programmes in Engineering, Liberal Arts, Sciences and Business
Postgraduate and Ph.D programmes with research focus
Emerging technologies tracks including Energy Engineering, Defence Engineering, and Semiconductor Technologies
achievements: Ranked amongst top private universities in Nature Index and IIRF rankings
Strong placement records with international offers and high package averages

state.name: Andhra Pradesh
state.location: Southeastern coast of India along the Bay of Bengal
state.description: A culturally rich and naturally beautiful state known for classical arts, spiritual heritage, warm hospitality, and bold cuisine. Andhra Pradesh blends centuries-old traditions with modern education and innovation, making it an ideal environment for research communities like Next Tech Lab and institutions like SRM University-AP.

language.notes: One of India's designated classical languages with a deep literary and poetic history.

cuisine.notes: Widely regarded as one of the spiciest and most flavorful cuisines in India.

nature_and_geography.coastline: Long Bay of Bengal coastline with beaches and ports

connection_to_university.context: SRM University-AP and Next Tech Lab operate in Amaravati, benefiting from the state's peaceful environment, strong educational ecosystem, and culturally vibrant student community.
benefits: Blend of tradition and modern research
